title: Primary happy path

commands.summary: Final S07 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

commands.command: claude -p --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence --tools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format json
commands.summary: Single valid read-only S07 Claude review completed against /tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m04-s07-review-packet.diff.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, invoke Claude runtime review, write review queues, write review assignments, send review notifications, replace human approval, evaluate runtime permission, call an AuthZ evaluator, run a permission engine, append audit ledgers, write audit events, write databases, write storage, or persist product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S07 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid review completed once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S07 implementation GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Two P3 notes are informational and explicitly deferred.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic Primary happy path because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, audit write, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.primary_happy_path: S07 prechecks the S06 Audit hint result as metadata only, emits canonical happy path metadata, fails closed on missing audit refs and unsafe claims, preserves model and read-only review semantics, keeps RP00.P02.M04 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S08.
